# tags / filter

The **tags** (multi-value) type's `data-view.filter` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Filter({ match: "tags", ... })` — a multi-select
chip `Control` (one `ToggleChip` per `field.options` entry, toggling membership
of a `selected: string[]`) plus the pure, **array-aware** `predicate` /
`isActive` applied in the data-view row pipeline. With no selection the filter
is inactive and keeps every row; otherwise a row matches when its tag set
intersects the selected set (match-any via `.some`).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Tags (multi-value) field type: data-view filter operator set (contains / contains-any-of …).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Filter` "tags"
  - Uses: `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/toggle-chip.ToggleChip`, `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`
